### `id`

integer

### `date_created`

string (date-time)

The moment when the item was created.

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_modified`

string (date-time)

The last moment when the item was modified. A value in year 1750 indicates the value is unknown

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_filed`

string (date)

The date the cluster of opinions was filed by the court

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `scdb_id`

string

The ID of the item in the Supreme Court Database

### `scdb_decision_direction`

integer

the ideological "direction" of a decision in the Supreme Court database. More details at: http://scdb.wustl.edu/documentation.php?var=decisionDirection

Choices (3):

| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `1` | Conservative |
| `2` | Liberal |
| `3` | Unspecifiable |

### `scdb_votes_majority`

integer

the number of justices voting in the majority in a Supreme Court decision. More details at: http://scdb.wustl.edu/documentation.php?var=majVotes

### `scdb_votes_minority`

integer

the number of justices voting in the minority in a Supreme Court decision. More details at: http://scdb.wustl.edu/documentation.php?var=minVotes

### `citation_count`

integer

The number of times this document is cited by other opinion

### `precedential_status`

string

The precedential status of document, one of: Published, Unpublished, Errata, Separate, In-chambers, Relating-to, Unknown

Choices (7):

| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `"Published"` | Precedential |
| `"Unpublished"` | Non-Precedential |
| `"Errata"` | Errata |
| `"Separate"` | Separate Opinion |
| `"In-chambers"` | In-chambers |
| `"Relating-to"` | Relating-to orders |
| `"Unknown"` | Unknown Status |

### `date_blocked`

string (date)

The date that this opinion was blocked from indexing by search engines

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `blocked`

boolean

Whether a document should be blocked from indexing by search engines
